ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film from IMDb */,
  "film_title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the film's plot and themes */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the film based on user reviews */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the directors table */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company responsible for the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the film */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_helpfulness" REAL /* Helpfulness score of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_imdb_id FOREIGN KEY ("imdb_id") REFERENCES films ("imdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genres table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdb_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular, reviewer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genres table */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Score indicating the user's preference for the genre */,
  "preference_source" TEXT /* Source of the preference (e.g., manual input, inferred from user behavior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "desirability_scores" (
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "desirability_score" REAL /* Calculated desirability score for the film */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the desirability score was last updated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the desirability score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the film was viewed */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of times the film was downloaded */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the film was shared */,
  "last_analyzed" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was last updated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to interact with the film */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used to interact with the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_rating_distribution" (
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "one_star" INTEGER /* Count of one-star ratings */,
  "two_stars" INTEGER /* Count of two-star ratings */,
  "three_stars" INTEGER /* Count of three-star ratings */,
  "four_stars" INTEGER /* Count of four-star ratings */,
  "five_stars" INTEGER /* Count of five-star ratings */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received by the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., review, rate, recommend) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_actions_imdb_id FOREIGN KEY ("imdb_id") REFERENCES films ("imdb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the films table */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_recommendations_imdb_id FOREIGN KEY ("imdb_id") REFERENCES films ("imdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "operating_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "operating_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "operating_system_description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operating_system_id")
)
